hackathons.name: FOSS Hackathon (localhost)
hackathons.problem_statement: Build an open-source solution that benefits the developer/tech community.
hackathons.solution: Built Xrepo – an open-source collaborative platform for developing, sharing, and iterating on quantum algorithms with real-time collaboration and AI-powered documentation.
outcomes: Represented PESITM at Pan-India ADVAYA Hackathon at BGSCET Bengaluru
Built Xrepo – a quantum circuit collaborative platform
